_README: FAKE reference data for Life OS (persona: Alex @ Acme — entirely fictional). NOT wired to the build: the current engine GROUPS only has work groups; the product must EXTEND the groups map with the domain ids below (one color+sector per domain). Use these as the guide for what each life domain's nodes look like. Zero real data.

nodes.label: Promotion case H2
nodes.detail: Build the promotion case from the done_log evidence: ship visibly, present monthly, keep the health-note streak.

nodes.label: Emergency fund 6m
nodes.detail: Target: 6 months of expenses. Monthly close ritual feeds the number; auto-transfer on payday.

nodes.label: Run 5K under 30min
nodes.detail: 3 trainings/week (ritual). Logistics only: plan, streak, race date — no medical advice.

nodes.label: Visit parents monthly

people.r: loves orchids — gift memory lives in memory.personas

nodes.detail: One visit/month minimum. The relationship IS the metric; memory holds dates and gift ideas.

nodes.label: English B2→C1
nodes.detail: Goal: lead a meeting in English by Q4. Lessons ritual + 1 presentation/month at work (double count with car-promo).

nodes.label: Passport renewal
nodes.detail: Deadline-driven admin: book appointment, gather docs. Typical 'hogar' node: low glory, high regret if missed.

nodes.label: Side project: recipe app
nodes.detail: Matrix says: high complexity, medium value — stays 'idea' until fin-fund hits 6m. The matrix exists to say NO.

nodes.label: Annual north: independence
nodes.detail: The narrative everything hangs from. Quarterly review ritual re-scores every domain against it.

nodes.label: EX-12
nodes.sub: Tracker task: draft the promo doc

nodes.label: Sam
nodes.detail: Cares about: predictability, written evidence. Bring: monthly one-pager. Play: no surprises.

inbox_examples.t: Mom mentioned she wants to repaint the kitchen — birthday gift idea?

note.t: Mom loves orchids; hates surprises — announce visits ahead.

done_log_examples.t: January financial close — fund at 4.2 months
done_log_examples.g: Monthly close: income/expenses reviewed, auto-transfer confirmed.

rituals_examples.label: Monthly financial close
rituals_examples.guide: Review the month, update the fund number, confirm auto-transfers.
rituals_examples.excel: • One trend + one decision, not just numbers.
